title: PTD Today — Media

items.title: Would you go to an in-person dating app event?

ai.summary: Based on the available description, Hinge announced a $1 million fund to support social groups in New York, Los Angeles and London to put on free or affordable social events for young people. The global expansion of Hinge's One More Hour initiative is presented as a response to rising loneliness among Gen Z.
bullets: Gen Z is increasingly struggling with loneliness.
Hinge launched a $1 million fund for social groups.
Funding targets New York, Los Angeles and London.
Grants are for free or affordable social events for young people.
This is a global expansion of the One More Hour social impact initiative.
takeaways: Funding focuses activity in three major metropolitan markets (NY, LA, London), so expect localized increases in event activity.
Event-driven gatherings often occur evenings/weekends—monitor for potential shifts in local peak power demand around sponsored events.
Operators should be aware of short-term, venue-level energy and connectivity needs when community events scale up in targeted areas.

items.title: Build Knowledge Graph-powered AI Agents For Your Use Case | Databases for AI

ai.summary: Based on the available description… This session shows an end-to-end demo that automatically builds a knowledge graph from raw documents and connects it to an AI agent so the agent understands your company. The focus is on delivering that capability without requiring graph queries or graph-theory expertise.
bullets: Automate creation of a knowledge graph from raw documents
Connect the knowledge graph to an AI agent that understands company-specific data
Designed to avoid requiring graph queries or graph-theory knowledge
End-to-end build/demo format to show practical implementation
Links to a prior episode comparing VectorDB vs GraphDB for agents
takeaways: Enables AI agents to leverage internal documentation and business knowledge for more relevant outputs
Automation lowers the barrier to deploying knowledge-augmented agents (less need for graph specialists)
End-to-end approach can speed proof-of-concept and operational deployment timelines
Relevant for use cases where accurate, company-specific context is critical to AI-driven decisions

items.title: Leveraging tax credits and incentives for sustainability projects

ai.summary: Based on the available description, Randa Barsoum, Tax Partner at PwC US, explains that while energy-related tax credits are often top of mind, other incentives—such as state and local abatements, location-based incentives, and R&D tax credits tied to innovation—also support sustainability projects. The central point: viewing sustainability investments through a broader tax-incentive lens can unlock meaningful tax value.
bullets: Energy incentives are commonly considered but are only part of the tax picture.
State and local abatements and location-based incentives can support sustainability initiatives.
R&D tax credits may apply to innovation efforts like reimagining packaging or processes.
Broad evaluation of tax incentives can uncover additional tax value from sustainability investments.
takeaways: When siting or upgrading grid/data center assets, evaluate state and local abatements and location-based incentives in addition to energy credits.
Include potential R&D tax credits when planning innovation projects tied to operations or infrastructure improvements.
Treat sustainability investments as potential sources of tax value by assessing a wide range of incentives.
Incorporate identification of less-obvious credits into project planning to maximize tax benefits.

Clear call to action to download and try Copilot via the link in the bio.

Leverage short, inspirational creative to support broader product awareness.
Consider similar user-facing communications for internal adoption or staff engagement initiatives.

items.title: GeForce Garage - Summer of RTX Community Build

ai.summary: Based on the available description… The video announces the winner of the Summer of RTX r/buildapc Community Build Contest (u/JeffersonPutnam) and showcases their small-form-factor GeForce RTX 5090 rig. The description lists the full parts used and links to the PCPartPicker build and GeForce social/community pages.
bullets: Winner: u/JeffersonPutnam — small-form-factor GeForce RTX 5090 build
Chassis: Fractal Design Era 2
GPU: GeForce RTX 5090 Founders Edition
Core components: MSI MPG B850I Edge, Ryzen 7 9800X3D, 32GB DDR5-6000
Power & cooling: Corsair SF1000 and Corsair Nautilus 240 RS; PCPartPicker link provided
takeaways: Shows a flagship GeForce RTX 5090 Founders Edition installed in a compact Fractal Design Era 2 chassis with high-wattage SFX power and AIO cooling.
Complete parts list (PCPartPicker) is provided for reproducibility and to review power/thermal choices for similar compact systems.
GeForce social and community links in the description provide sources for additional build details and community engagement around this configuration.

items.title: TTEC accelerates AI deployment and revenue streams with Google Cloud Consulting

ai.summary: Based on the available description, TTEC partnered with Google Cloud Consulting to rapidly prototype and deploy AI solutions that unlocked new revenue streams and streamlined operations. Sreeni Alakappan, VP of App Development and Automation at TTEC, highlights how leveraging GenAI and Google Cloud's infrastructure boosted developer productivity and compressed their digital transformation timeline.
bullets: TTEC worked with Google Cloud Consulting to accelerate AI prototyping and deployment.
GenAI and Google Cloud infrastructure were central to the initiative.
Effort focused on streamlining operations and improving developer productivity.
The collaboration enabled new revenue streams for TTEC.
Google Cloud Consulting helped compress TTEC’s digital transformation timeline.
takeaways: Cloud consulting can accelerate AI prototyping and shorten transformation timelines.
Robust cloud infrastructure enables deploying GenAI-driven solutions that support new revenue models.
Improved developer productivity from managed cloud services can speed time-to-market and operational changes.
